summary: Phase 4 admin (JWT+bcrypt) tested end-to-end. 26/26 backend pytest tests passed and full admin UI flow (login → dashboard → product create/edit/delete → category delete-guard → orders) works via Playwright. Customer homepage still renders correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~650 lines — approaching split threshold; consider splitting into routers (auth, products, categories, orders, uploads) as more features are added.
test_credentials.md lists 'preparing' as a valid status but backend VALID_ORDER_STATUSES = {received, confirmed, ready, collected, cancelled}. Update the doc to remove 'preparing' to avoid confusion.

CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — technically incompatible with browsers when cookies are used; harmless here since auth is Bearer-token in localStorage, but should be tightened for production.
Admin token stored in localStorage (XSS-susceptible). Acceptable for MVP but consider httpOnly cookie in future.
seed_data_creation: None persisted — test products/categories are created and deleted within tests. One admin order (KHFC-260704-*) placed via API remains in DB (status=collected).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth, category/product CRUD (incl. 409 on delete-with-products), image upload allow/deny, and full order lifecycle. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Admin UI verified at /admin with credentials from test_credentials.md.
